description: Maps Hashimoto Utaro N[] values and book-level context to puzzle intent descriptions. N[] values from dir '179 Skillful Life and Death' provide direct intent. Other directories infer intent from book genre.

notes.179_skillful: Intent derived per-file from N[] values (n_value_intents map). directory_intents is null because each file has its own intent.
notes.other_dirs: Generic 'Black to play' — the pipeline's intent resolver can refine further from solution tree analysis.
